2604.07154.title: Bridging MRI and PET physiology: Untangling complementarity through orthogonal representations
2604.07154.paper_summary: Multimodal imaging analysis often relies on joint latent representations, yet these approaches rarely define what information is shared versus modality-specific. Clarifying this distinction is clinically relevant, as it delineates the irreducible contribution of each modality and informs rational acquisition strategies. We propose a subspace decomposition framework that reframes multimodal fusion as a problem of orthogonal subspace separation rather than translation. We decompose Prostate-Specific Membrane Antigen (PSMA) PET uptake into an MRI-explainable physiological envelope and an orthogonal residual reflecting signal components not expressible within the MRI feature manifold. Using multiparametric MRI, we train an intensity-based, non-spatial implicit neural representation (INR) to map MRI feature vectors to PET uptake. We introduce a projection-based regularization using singular value decomposition to penalize residual components lying within the span of the MRI feature manifold. This enforces mathematical orthogonality between tissue-level physiological properties (structure, diffusion, perfusion) and intracellular PSMA expression. Tested on 13 prostate cancer patients, the model demonstrates that residual components spanned by MRI features are absorbed into the learned envelope, while the orthogonal residual is largest in tumour regions. This indicates that PSMA PET contains signal components not recoverable from MRI-derived physiological descriptors. The resulting decomposition provides a structured characterization of modality complementarity grounded in representation geometry rather than image translation.
2604.07154.paper_summary_zh: 多模態影像分析通常依賴於聯合潛在表示，但這些方法很少明確定義共享的信息與特定於模態的信息之間的區別。澄清這一區別在臨床上具有重要意義，因為它劃分了每種模態的不可簡化貢獻，並提供了合理的獲取策略。我們提出了一個子空間分解框架，將多模態融合重新框定為正交子空間分離的問題，而不是轉換。我們將前列腺特異性膜抗原（PSMA）PET攝取分解為一個MRI可解釋的生理包絡和一個反映在MRI特徵流形內無法表達的信號成分的正交殘差。使用多參數MRI，我們訓練了一個基於強度的非空間隱式神經表示（INR），以將MRI特徵向量映射到PET攝取。我們引入了一種基於投影的正則化，使用奇異值分解來懲罰位於MRI特徵流形跨度內的殘差成分。這強化了組織層面生理特性（結構、擴散、灌注）與細胞內PSMA表達之間的數學正交性。在13名前列腺癌患者上進行測試，該模型顯示MRI特徵所跨越的殘差成分被吸收進學習到的包絡中，而正交殘差在腫瘤區域最大。這表明PSMA PET包含的信號成分無法從MRI衍生的生理描述中恢復。最終的分解提供了一種基於表示幾何而非影像轉換的模態互補性結構化特徵描述。
2604.07154.author: Sonja Adomeit et.al.
2604.07154.authors: Sonja Adomeit, Kartikay Tehlan, Lukas Förner, Katharina Weisser, Helen Scholtiseek, David Kaufmann, Julie Steinestel, Constantin Lapa, Thomas Kröncke, Thomas Wendler
